concerns.text: T007 (Create base data models/entities) must precede T004 (Setup SQLite database schema). Schema definition depends on entity structure; cannot create tables before knowing what entities exist.

T005 [P] (consent flow) and T006 [P] (logging) marked parallel-safe but may depend on T007 (models) and T008 (config). Consent.py likely needs database schema; logging may need config paths. Verify no hidden dependencies before marking [P].

T010 [P] and T011 [P] (contract/integration tests) marked parallel-safe but tests cannot execute before implementation tasks (T012-T020) are complete. Tests depend on implementation artifacts; [P] tag is incorrect.
T014 (randomization.py) duplicates T009 from Phase 2. Randomization module should be implemented once in Foundational phase; US1 should only consume it, not re-implement.
T016 (timestamp logging) and T017 (submission ID generation) should precede T013 (Flask interface). The interface consumes these utilities; producer must precede consumer.
T021 [P] and T022 [P] (contract/integration tests) marked parallel-safe but depend on T023-T026 implementation. Tests cannot run before metric computation tasks are complete.
T029 (Integrate quality metrics with Submission entity) depends on T023-T026 (individual metric implementations). Integration task must follow all component implementations.
T030 [P] and T031 [P] (contract/integration tests) marked parallel-safe but depend on T032-T038 implementation. Tests cannot execute before statistical analysis tasks are complete.
T035 (95% CI computation) should precede T036 (Generate analysis report). Report generation consumes confidence intervals; producer must precede consumer.
T037 (Export results to CSV) should follow T036 (Generate analysis report). Export consumes the report; ordering should reflect data flow.
